mentions.note: IPO up 33% on debut (priced $24.50, closed $32.56). Asset-light T3 software + OWN sale-leaseback model enables rapid organic expansion. 140% revenue CAGR 2015–24; 36% 3-yr CAGR vs 12% (United Rentals), 17% (Herc). EV/EBITDA 14.5x justified by growth and disruption. Buy small, add on weakness.
